creator: marius@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you please test whether the following change:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/269050
makes a difference for the data corruption you see with virtualized i386?
In general, could you please describe the environment you are seen this
with in more detail, i. e. the exact VMM, physical CPU, emulated disk
controller etc. being used?
